auditTarget: P1-5 Compliance findings can be deleted before replacement inserts succeed.
certifyingReason: Automated local simulation and regression proof only; no live production database concurrency certification is claimed.

automatedProofs.name: insert failure preserves previous active findings
successful scan atomically replaces previous auto findings
manual/admin and non-active findings survive replacement
packet readiness does not observe partial findings
concurrent scan simulation does not produce mixed active truth
